Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS JOE PEARSON, SELENA PEARSON's Motion For Order Substituting Selena Pearson As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substituting Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff; For Leave To File First Amended Complaint; And To Add Previously Sued Doe Defendant To The First Amended Complaint:

is GRANTED. (C.C.P. Sections 377.20, 377.31, 377.11, 377.32, 377.60, and 473.) No opposition filed.

Defendant WESTERN ASBESTOS SETTLEMENT TRUST (previously sued as Does 2 and 305) is added as a party to the survival and wrongful death causes of action. Plaintiffs shall file and serve the First Amended Complaint forthwith on the newly added defendant, as well as on those defendants who have not yet appeared in this case. The First Amended Complaint is deemed served on defendants 3M Company and Metropolitan Life Insurance Company only, as they have already appeared in the action and were served with the instant motion. It is further ordered that legal heirs (i) HOLLYETTE LEXINGTON; (ii) TRACY ROEBUCK; and (iii) EDDIE RICHARDSON shall be added as plaintiffs to this action.

Order is signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (301)
